name: Google Cloud Functions using deprecated or decommissioned runtimes
query:
{
  functions(
    where: {
      cloudProvider: { eq: "gcp" }
      runtime_IN: [
        "nodejs20"
        "nodejs18"
        "nodejs16"
        "nodejs14"
        "nodejs12"
        "nodejs10"
        "nodejs8"
        "nodejs6"
        "python39"
        "python38"
        "python37"
        "go123"
        "go122"
        "go121"
        "go120"
        "go119"
        "go118"
        "go116"
        "go113"
        "go111"
        "java11"
        "ruby32"
        "ruby30"
        "ruby27"
        "ruby26"
        "php81"
        "php74"
        "dotnet6"
        "dotnet3"
      ]
    }
  ) {
    ...AssetFragment
    runtime
  }
}
